center.name: 对马
center.summary: 对马是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Japanese green woodpecker，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This woodpecker is found in most big islands of Japan, and also smaller islands like Tobishima, Awashima, Sado and Tsushima

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This woodpecker is found in most big islands of Japan, and also smaller islands like Tobishima, Awashima, Sado and Tsushima
